title: Wire onboarding wizard: live gathering, interactive shell, golden robot docs
description: Follow-on to 5u82n.6 (pure onboarding recommendation core in src/source_onboarding.rs, committed 847dea97). Wire the surface on top of recommend()/OnboardingReport: (1) gather a live OnboardingObservation from triage + source discovery + models status + health/status + privacy preview; (2) the cass onboarding --json command + a thin interactive shell that never launches bare TUI in agent mode; (3) golden robot docs pinning the examples. The deterministic recommendation logic, 8 machine-state fixtures, safe-defaults, non-destructive-command + no-mutation invariants, and JSON contract already shipped in 5u82n.6.

dependencies.title: Epic: Guided operations, repro capsules, and trust-scored knowledge surfaces
Build first-run source onboarding and readiness wizard

comments.author: ubuntu
comments.text: Unblocked: 5u82n.6 landed the live onboarding gathering + `cass onboarding --json` command + golden robot docs (capabilities/introspect auto-include it) 35fbf240. REMAINING for this bead = the rich INTERACTIVE wizard shell (still must never launch bare TUI in agent mode) on top of the existing run_onboarding/recommend() core + any extra curated robot-docs example.
